message: you have open user requests this session but no sign of maintaining the visible ledger (no Edit/Write/NotebookEdit to .brainer/ledger/<sid>.md and no TaskCreate/TaskUpdate) in the recent window — materialize or refresh .brainer/ledger/<sid>.md (the file is authoritative; native tasks mirror it) so an item the user raised is not silently dropped. Decompose each user message into ATOMIC rows; never delete a row, only re-status.
